Section 1  
Process input data by grouping entries based on age group.  

Section 2  
Count frequency of each health improvement within every age group.  

Section 3  
Identify the most frequent improvement for each age group.  

Section 4  
Ensure output is structured as a dictionary with age groups as keys.  

Section 5  
Return the final summary with the top improvement per age group.  

Section 6  
* Use efficient data structures to manage counts.  
* Avoid redundant checks to improve performance.  

Section 7  
Ensure the function meets all constraints and returns the correct format.
